description: Log into Moodle (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and navigate to the 'Nursing 101' course. Access the Course Question Bank and create a new question category named exactly 'Cardiology NCLEX Review'. Then, use the Import tool to upload the 15 multiple-choice questions from the Aiken format text file located on your Desktop (~/Desktop/cardiology_nclex_questions.txt) into your newly created 'Cardiology NCLEX Review' category.
